response.justification: Well over the required six years of fullstack experience with a stack that closely matches the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in recent product roles, plus AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure. Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly addresses the AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background (test libraries authored, TDD practiced professionally) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and Java appears only in older roles.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience at product companies
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development in current role
Strong testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience is dated
Long generalist history across many domains may need probing for recent depth
